items.title: Burgh Trading Act 1846
items.description: An Act for the Abolition of the exclusive Privilege of trading in Burghs in Scotland.

items.title: Art Unions Act 1846 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for legalizing Art Unions.

items.title: Citations (Scotland) Act 1846
items.description: An Act to remove Doubts concerning Citations, and Services and Execution of Diligence, in Scotland.

items.title: Inclosure Act 1846
items.description: An Act to amend the Act to facilitate the Inclosure and Improvement of Commons.

items.title: Marriages (Ireland) Act 1846
items.description: An Act to amend the Act for Marriages in Ireland, and for registering such Marriages.

items.title: Tithe Act 1846 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act further to amend the Acts for the Commutation of Tithes in England and Wales.
